title: Wedding of Luke Skywalker and Mara Jade
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Cleanup}} {{Event |prev= |conc= |next= |image=[[File:Jedi_Wedding.jpg]] |name=The Wedding of Luke Skywalker and Mara Jade |conflict= |date=[[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], three months after the end of the [[Caamas Document Crisis]][[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] |place=[[Jedi Headquarters]], [[Reflection Gardens]]; [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]''[[Star Wars: Union]]'' |outcome= |keyparties= |participants=*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] {{C|Groom}} *[[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] {{C|Bride}} '''Jedi Wedding:''' *[[Kam Solusar]] {{C|Officiant}} *[[Cilghal]] *[[Dorsk 82]] *[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] *[[Anakin Solo]] *[[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] *[[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] *[[Tionne Solusar]] '''Official wedding:''' *[[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Admiral Ackbar]] {{C|Officiant}} *[[Elegos A'Kla]] *[[Borsk Fey'lya]] *[[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek Klivian]] *[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] *[[Booster Terrik]] *[[Mirax Terrik Horn]] *[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and her [[Solo family/Legends|family]] *[[Talon Karrde]] *[[Valin Horn]] *[[Syal Antilles]] *[[Myri Antilles]] }} {{Quote|How do you react to criticism that this is a move to solidify a Jedi power-base and establish a Force empire?''"
"''Criticism? I just made the announcement! This is just my brother's wedding, we're talking about, not some political revolt.|Leia Organa Solo responding to questions from a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] audience member after announcing the wedding|}} The '''Wedding of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]]''' took place in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], shortly after the end of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It consisted of two [[Marriage/Legends|weddings]]: the first, a private ceremony held at [[Jedi Headquarters]], was only open to members of the [[New Jedi Order]]. The second was a large public event that ex-[[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Derran Takkar]] tried to disrupt. [[Kam Solusar]] officiated and [[Talon Karrde]] gave Mara away. ==Prelude to First Wedding== [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], the groom's twin sister, announced her brother Luke and Mara's wedding on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Many criticized it with the view that the wedding was an establishment for a "Force Empire", or peace package. Leia put [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] in to "handle" the crowd. The [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] started by discussing how he came to meet Luke, and drifted off topic, boring many. This spared [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] the trouble of coming in blasting, mainly because he did not have enough clips. Leia told him to bring the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Falcon'']] next time. Later, Leia convinced Mara to try out dresses for the second wedding, under phrase "[[minimal is maximal]]." They went through at least seven: a [[Color/Legends|brown]] dress that was revealing, a gown with a mask, a green luminescent, a dress based on Mara's parameters, a [[Neo-Imperial style|neo-Imperial]] cloak that resembled the [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|groom's father]], one meant for [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], and one that she refused to come out in. Tired of everything, Mara ran out into the streets of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. She ran into a lone [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]], [[Jari'kyn]], who was fired by [[Vanar|her boss]] for making a better dress for the wedding. Mara admired Jari'kyn's designs and accepted her as the new designer. ==The Unofficial Wedding== At the Jedi Temple, surrounded by their fellow [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], [[Kam Solusar]] married Luke and Mara. After joining their bonding stones, they were unofficially declared wedded. All assembled Jedi ignited their [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] in salute. ==Prelude to the Official Wedding== At Luke's bachelor party at the [[Red Rancor]], he was surprised by several friends: Han, [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], [[Gavin Darklighter]], [[Talon Karrde]], [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]], [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]], [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek Klivian]], Kam Solusar, [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], [[Booster Terrik]], and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. Unfortunately, Luke was accidentally drawn into a brawl in an attempt to kill him; he was saved by [[Banner Sumptor]], who had his moral and ethic issues with helping the Moffs stop the wedding. Also, [[Chik Apla]] was caught trying to assassinate Mara. The Moffs then came up with contingency plans: steal the dress, get inside the wedding, among other things. The next day, Mara, Leia, [[Tionne Solusar]], [[Winter Celchu]], [[Mirax Terrik Horn]], and [[Iella Wessiri Antilles]] had their bachelorette party at a spa without telling their husbands. Enjoying the hot springs and the mud baths, the women beat [[Champion Squadron]] at [[slingball]]. Mara was annoyed at Luke when she learnt that Luke had got into a bar fight the night before their wedding. ==The "True" Wedding== [[File:SkywalkerKissyFaces-UnionTPB.jpg|thumb|right|Luke and Mara marrying.]] On the day of the second wedding, the audience was waiting for Jari'kyn to arrive with the dresses. Unfortunately, a group of thugs, led by [[Anlys Takkar]], [[Derran Takkar]]'s wife, attempted to kill Jari'kyn and take the dresses. However, Banner turned on her and helped Jari'kyn get to the wedding on time to warn everyone. To keep the wedding going without causing a panic, Luke, Han, and Talon Karrde had to be present during the ceremony, while [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and the other Jedi dealt with the impending attacks. [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] were ushers. They took care of swoop gangs, attempts to gas the area, and dealing with thugs from the bar. Luckily, the latter were scared off by Booster Terrik, who was keeping the children asleep. Unfortunately, everything was a distraction for Derran, who had made his way through the sewers and entered the wedding as an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]]. When [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] made the opening statements, Derran revealed himself and threatened to destroy all communications in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] with a virus. Luke spoke to him, deducing that though he did not want peace, yet he could enjoy it. Takkar gave in and the ceremony continued. The virus would not have worked anyway, for the Republic had it shielded since they took [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Luke and Mara exchanged their vows and rings and were declared husband and wife. They then danced under the bright moonlight. ==Guests== ===Jedi wedding=== *[[Cilghal]] *[[Dorsk 82]] *[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] *[[Anakin Solo]] *[[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] *[[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] *[[Kam Solusar]] {{C|Officiated}} *[[Tionne Solusar]] ===Public wedding=== [[File:Wed.jpg|thumb|Luke and Mara are wed.]] *[[Elegos A'Kla]] *[[Borsk Fey'lya]] *[[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek Klivian]] *[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] *[[Booster Terrik]] *[[Mirax Terrik Horn]] *[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and her [[Solo family/Legends|family]] *[[Talon Karrde]] *[[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Admiral Ackbar]] (officiated) *[[Valin Horn]] *[[Syal Antilles]] *[[Myri Antilles]] ==Behind the scenes== The Wedding of Luke Skywalker and Mara Jade was first mentioned in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s [[1998]] novel ''[[Vision of the Future]]''. It was then featured in the [[1999]]-[[2000]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series ''[[Star Wars: Union]]''. ''[[Star Wars]]'' creator [[George Lucas]] stated that the stories presented by the Expanded Universe following the events of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi'']], specifically including the marriage of Luke Skywalker, does not fit his vision for the Jedi as in his mind, the main story of ''Star Wars'' ends with the tragedy of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Total_Film ''Total Film''] magazine, May 2008 ==Appearances== *''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} *[[Union 1|''Union'' 1]] {{Mo}} *[[Union 2|''Union'' 2]] {{1st}} *[[Union 3|''Union'' 3]] {{Mo}} *[[Union 4|''Union'' 4]] {{Mo}} *"[[Judge's Call]]" {{Mo}}
